page_metadata.biotools__summary: SBGNview is an R package, which adopts Systems Biology Graphical Notation (SBGN) and greatly extends the Pathview package by supporting multiple major pathway databases beyond KEGG.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: SBGNview is an R package, which adopts Systems Biology Graphical Notation (SBGN) and greatly extends the Pathview package by supporting multiple major pathway databases beyond KEGG.
